CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(SBQQ__BillingStreet__c), "", SBQQ__BillingStreet__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(SBQQ__BillingCity__c), "", SBQQ__BillingCity__c & ", ") & IF(ISBLANK(SBQQ__BillingState__c), "", SBQQ__BillingState__c & " ") & IF(ISBLANK(SBQQ__BillingPostalCode__c), "", SBQQ__BillingPostalCode__c & BR()) & IF(ISBLANK(SBQQ__BillingCountry__c), "", SBQQ__BillingCountry__c)
CustomField.label: Billing Address Text
